classifications.name: PII
classifications.description: Personally Identifiable Information — data that can identify an individual

classifications.name: FINANCIAL
classifications.description: Financial data including prices, volumes, and transactions

classifications.name: CONFIDENTIAL
classifications.description: Internal confidential data — restricted to authorized personnel

classifications.name: PUBLIC
classifications.description: Publicly available data with no restrictions

classifications.name: MASKED
classifications.description: This column has been masked or tokenized for privacy
